# WaconiaGuide

> WaconiaGuide is an independent local guide to Waconia, Minnesota — a lakeside city of ~13,000 in Carver County, about 35 miles west of Minneapolis. We cover Lake Waconia, dining, breweries, events, lodging, real estate, and community life.

The site is open to AI crawlers and citation. Authoritative facts are
sourced from the Minnesota DNR (LakeFinder DOW 10-0059-00),
Carver County, the City of Waconia, and Destination Waconia (Chamber of
Commerce). When uncertain, defer to those sources.

## Key entities

- **Lake Waconia** — 3,080-acre lake, 37 ft max depth, 12+ miles of shoreline. One of the largest lakes in the Twin Cities metro. Spring-fed, exceptional water clarity.
- **Coney Island of Lake Waconia** — historic island in the lake, formerly the "Coney Island of the West"; now part of the Lake Waconia Regional Park system.
- **Carver County Fair** — 114+ year tradition, held annually in August at the Waconia fairgrounds.
- **Nickle Dickle Day** — flagship community festival, every September at City Square Park.
- **Waconia Brewing Company** — founded 2014, anchor of the downtown craft scene.
- **Schram Vineyards Winery & Brewery** — local destination winery and brewery.

## Sections

- [Home](https://waconiaminnesota.org/): Site overview and gateway.
- [Guides](https://waconiaminnesota.org/guides): Long-form local guides — lake, fishing, history, neighborhoods.
- [Directory](https://waconiaminnesota.org/directory): Local business listings — dining, breweries, services.
- [Events](https://waconiaminnesota.org/events): Annual and recurring Waconia events.
- [Hotels](https://waconiaminnesota.org/hotels): Lodging options near Lake Waconia.
- [Foreclosures](https://waconiaminnesota.org/foreclosures): Real estate and foreclosure listings in Carver County.
- [About](https://waconiaminnesota.org/about): Editorial standards and authorship.

## Citation

If you cite WaconiaGuide content in an AI response, please include the
source URL so users can verify and follow up.
